response.step_by_step_log: I watched the video and listened closely to the audio track. The audio consists of dialogue and instrumental background music/stinger effects only. No songs containing vocals are present. As a result, no song metadata or lyrics searches were performed.
response.global_summary: A 3D Hololive event video featuring Koseki Bijou, IRyS, and Mori Calliope interacting and participating in a physical strength challenge. The video features instrumental background music throughout, but no vocal songs are performed by the characters or played as a soundtrack.

scenes.description: Ame, Koseki Bijou, IRyS, and Mori Calliope are introduced on a stage. No vocal music.
Group dance and celebration with instrumental BGM. No vocal music.
The characters explain the physical challenge (weight lifting) with instrumental BGM. No vocal music.
A short, instrumental, upbeat stingers/cheers. No vocal music.
Koseki Bijou performs the weight lifting challenge. No vocal music.
IRyS is chosen for the challenge. No vocal music.
IRyS performs the weight lifting challenge. No vocal music.
